headerTitle: Forward Deployed Engineer  ·  LLM Compliance Platform  ·  Full-Stack API Engineering  ·  Series A Startup
subjectText: Forward Deployed Engineer — Haast (Remote US) · $180K–$220K + equity
intro: Haast is building the LLM compliance layer that marketing and legal teams actually need — and needs an FDE who owns both the customer relationship and technical implementation simultaneously. Six cycles completed across eight industries.
bullets: Full-stack API engineering in production — TypeScript/Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, 100+ REST API routes, BullMQ + Redis, Stripe, Google OAuth2, Twilio. All running across 13 platforms.

LLM document processing — parse, classify, and extract structured data from contracts, proposals, and compliance documents using Claude and GPT-4o. Zod-validated output, human-review gates. Same architecture as Haast’s compliance platform applied to a new vertical.

Technical customer relationships — six engagements as the sole technical contact for non-engineering stakeholders. Gathered requirements, shipped features, drove adoption, documented handoff. Six for six independent.
closingLine: Available immediately. TX-based remote, eligible US.
matchNotes: Strong on full-stack TypeScript/Node.js, LLM document processing, and customer-facing FDE pattern. Go is a gap — Node.js is the bridge. Compliance domain is adjacent (document processing + structured LLM output in production). Series A startup velocity = direct match.
